{
  "current_life_events": "He just secured a 45‑minute pitch slot with a venture fund next week, but the bank still demands payments on the loan from his dissolved startup. Over the weekend he tried a solo mountain‑bike run to clear his head, only to find himself lying awake replaying the pitch deck and the debt notice.",
  "mental_state": "A mix of restless focus and lingering self‑doubt; he feels the weight of past failure while chasing a new opportunity.",

}
